creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this in your Dubai Bucket List! 

@skyviewsobservatory is the most thrilling attraction in Downtown Dubai. Located in level 53 of Address Sky Views Hotel, this is the best spot to conquer your fear of heights. 

Here’s what you need to know about the Edge Walk experience:
• This experience takes about an hour.
• Outfit and gears will be provided. Just make sure to wear comfy clothes and shoes.
• Safety is a priority! Briefing is done before the activity and a staff will guide you at the outdoor ledge.
• Once outside, you’ll get to have a breathtaking view of Burj Khalifa, Downtown Dubai, Sheikh Zayed Road, and beyond!
• Gather up your courage and try the edge walk stunts. The staff can assist you on this. 😄

Are you ready to do sky-high activity? 
Tag your adventure buddies!
